description_long: This is a gold-colored ring featuring three prominent faceted gemstones set into its band. The central gemstone is the largest and is flanked by two smaller stones, all of which are a striking blue color. The band itself is thick and rounded, with subtle decorative ridges and engravings visible along its outer surface. The gemstones are set in raised, circular bezels that add dimension and visual interest to the piece. The overall design is bold and ornate, suggesting a vintage or regal inspiration. The ring's craftsmanship and the combination of metallic and gem elements make it a statement piece of jewelry.
description: A gold-toned ring with three blue faceted gemstones set in ornate bezels, featuring decorative engravings and a bold, vintage-inspired design.
description_view_0: The ring is seen from the side, showing the smooth, rounded band and subtle engravings, with the gemstones only partially visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the side profile of the ring, clearly displaying one of the smaller blue gemstones and the thickness of the band.
description_view_2: A direct front view reveals all three blue gemstones prominently, with the central stone being the largest and most eye-catching.
description_view_3: The opposite angled view shows the other side of the ring, again emphasizing the side gemstone and the raised setting of the stones.
